live_schema_probe.method: read-only Supabase table/column probes from Stage 08 dry run

venue_atmosphere.compatibility_reason: Local schema defines venue_atmosphere.venue_id as REFERENCES public.venues(id). Do not write staging_venues.id values into it until a separate staging-specific atmosphere table or FK bridge is designed.

columns.why_needed: Stores Stage 01 raw facts, Stage 04 hero image metadata, Stage 05 editorial fields, Stage 06 quality gate details, warnings, and evidence without requiring many fragile typed columns.
columns.stage_08_mapping: canonical_data_payload_preview plus evidence, selected hero classification, warnings, and source provenance

columns.why_needed: Allows dry-run/apply reconciliation and rollback by batch.
Preserves Stage 06 status such as ready_for_db_staging separately from existing staging status.
Stores deterministic quality gate score for staging review.
Stores selected image/editorial atmosphere signal for review and filtering.
Stores Stage 05 approved mood tags in a queryable form.
Stores Stage 03/04/selection metadata including scene, quality, source URL, rights risk, and M3 model provenance without approving publication.
columns.stage_08_mapping: venue.hero_image classification, risk_flags, source_url, resolved_image_url, width, height, model_used

columns.why_needed: Makes image rights state explicit for review; must remain not_approved_for_publication.
Marks the selected staging hero reference without implying publication approval.
columns.stage_08_mapping: true for selected Stage 04 hero image only

columns.why_needed: Stores Stage 06 score breakdown, blockers, warnings, and gate status while preserving existing quality score fields.

venue_atmosphere_decision.reason: Existing local schema references public.venues(id), not public.staging_venues(id). Stage 08 apply should write prose to staging_venues.atmosphere_prose and enrichment_data until a staging-specific atmosphere table is introduced.

rollback_safety.why: All changes are nullable additive columns and indexes; no existing columns are altered, dropped, renamed, or made stricter.
rollback_safety.rollback_note: If rollback is needed before any data is written, manually drop the added indexes and columns. If data has been written, export rows for the relevant pipeline_batch_id first.

required_before_apply: Re-run Stage 08 dry-run to verify new columns are detected
Update/confirm Stage 08 apply mapping writes enrichment_data, selection_data, rights_status, is_selected_hero, and pipeline_quality_data
Keep venue_atmosphere disabled for staging apply

manual_apply_action.alternative: Open Supabase SQL editor and run supabase/migrations/06_pipeline_staging_bridge.sql manually
